data.name: 從貴族寵姬到烹飪女王：掌控風味與禁忌慾望
data.detailed_description:
失去了庇護者，就得尋找另一種生活方式

烹飪模擬器配餐廳管理！巧妙地将烹飪技能與貴族寵妃的經驗相結合！在過去熟悉的生活與完全新穎、不同的東西之間真正的沉浸。

  • 超過180張凱瑟琳的圖像！一切，只為討好新精英！

  • 眾多食材！將一切組合成立奇特的菜餚

  • 關注民眾的騷動！每天都會有新事件影響菜品的受歡迎度

  • 賺取巨額財富！從必須做某人僕人的必要中解放，成為真正獨立！

  • 當然，最愉快的是... 可以單手玩。享受吧！

節日時光結束了！不再有在私人貴族羽翼下城堡裡平靜慣常的生活。幸福有時過於短暫。貴族拋下一切甚至不加思索就逃走了。現在凱瑟琳失去了庇護，卻擁有了自己的餐廳。偶然？巧合？女人的智慧！

凱瑟琳將從零開始她的道路，從用最普通菜餚的簡單服務，到真正的餐廳生意巔峰！去市場買產品，規劃餐廳菜單，邀請客人，烹飪菜餚――這一切將成為凱瑟琳新生活的常態！

                                                                    凱瑟琳

習慣掌控一切的女孩。從旁觀者看來，做某人的寵妃似乎很簡單，但實際上凱瑟琳做的遠比表面上看起來的要多得多。她擅長操控他人，將整個局面置於自己的腳下，即便為此自己要屈膝於他人腳邊。現在，她將嘗試對自己來說的新事物――烹飪。她的成功結果只取決於你！

那還等什麼？烹飪的世界已在等待！

data.short_description: 烹飪模擬器，餐廳管理，還有美麗的凱瑟琳！學習烹飪，解鎖新食譜，享受真正貴族寵妃的工作！超過180張圖像和眾多菜餚已在遊戲中等待！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Microsoft® Windows® 10/11
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 10 compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 10 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: 2GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 10 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間

data.name: From Aristocrat's Pet to Culinary Queen: Reigning Over Flavors and Forbidden Desires
data.detailed_description:
Left without a patron, she'll have to find another way to live

A cooking simulator with restaurant management! Skillfully combine culinary skills with the experience of an aristocrat's favorite! A true immersion between your past familiar life and something completely new and different.

  • Over 180 images of Catherine! Everything just to please the new elite!

  • A multitude of ingredients! Combine everything into unusual dishes

  • Keep an eye on the people's unrest! Every day brings a new event affecting the popularity of dishes

  • Earn a fortune! Free yourself from the need to be someone's servant and become truly independent!

  • And of course, the most pleasant part... you can play with one hand. Enjoy!

The holiday season is over! No more peaceful, familiar life in the castle under the wing of a personal aristocrat. Happiness is sometimes too fleeting. The aristocrat fled, abandoning everything without a second thought. Now Catherine is left without protection, but with her own restaurant. A coincidence? An accident? Women's wisdom!

Catherine will have to start her journey from scratch, from simple service with the most ordinary dishes to the pinnacle of the restaurant business! Go to the market, buy products, plan the restaurant menu, invite guests, cook dishes - this will become Catherine's new normal!

                                                              Catherine

A girl who is used to keeping everything under control. Being someone's favorite may seem simple from the outside, but in reality, Catherine does much more than meets the eye. She knows how to control others, keep the entire situation under her heel - even if it means lowering herself to someone's feet for that. Now, she'll take on something new for herself - cooking. The result of her success depends only on you!

So why wait? The world of cooking is already waiting!

data.short_description: A cooking simulator, restaurant management, and all with the beautiful Catherine! Learn to cook, unlock new recipes, and enjoy the work of a real aristocrat's favorite! Over 180 images and a multitude of dishes are already waiting in the game!
data.supported_languages: English, French, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Japanese
